reviews.review_description: Everyone loves mini golf! Sometimes you don't want to stand up, walk around your room, and connect your 3D printed putter attachment... Instead, all you need are your hands! Put the controllers down and putt with the very intuitive pinch-to-putt mechanic. Think angry birds, but with a lot less birds. Fun level designs and leaderboards. You can completely tune out the world in VR mode, or enable MR and putt while you cook, clean, watch tv, fold laundry... I mean, you can do whatever you want, it's your life. Most importantly, the dev behind this and many great titles is awesome. He works hard, he fixes all the bugs, he's responsive on discord, and he'll take your feedback into consideration. I don't recommend games lightly. Both the game and the guy behind the game are awesome! Keep building something awesome!

reviews.review_title: GOLF BUT NOT AS WE KNOW IT
reviews.review_description:
Pocket Putt, is a simple idea, put down your controllers and play mini golf with your fingers, I have to say I’m quite good at it, it is one of those games you jump in for 5 minutes and just keep playing.
Stretch out the course across your play space and let your fingers do the work.
Great family fun and can get quite competitive.
All round top notch fun.

reviews.review_title: Highly recommended if you like mini-golf
reviews.review_description:
Very easy to jump into: 
Clean menu | 
Crisp graphics | 
No tutorial is needed (everybody knows mini-golf) | 
Hand gestures that are mastered in seconds | 
No loading screens (you are putting balls within 5 seconds after launching the game) 
---
Always something to aim for: 
Par, birdie, eagle, ... | 
Daily tasks | 
Weekly challenges | 
Achievements | 
Unlock new balls | 
Unlock new courses
---
I'm truly having a blast playing and would like a little bit of competition. 
Seriously, the only thing holding it back is the headset. 
If this ever releases on AR glasses, I reckon it will be a system seller.

Extremely fun to play. Different courses to try. You can also try to beat your own score based on time or number of shots which I thought was very smart. I still have more courses to try, but my battery ran out cause I was so addicted! Can't wait to try more courses!

reviews.review_title: Great variety and easy to play
reviews.review_description: If you want a straightforward mini-golf game, this is a great choice. The gameplay is accessible for anyone, the ball physics are satisfying, and the map designs are creative. Plus, the community-made courses ensure you always have something new to try.
Really fun, I got obsessed with trying to get one-shots or otherwise matching the best score on the leaderboard. Excellent game!
There's no other game like it, mixed reality and the colored scenery is beautiful and gameplay is smooth. Highly recommend, lots to do :)

Huge walkabout minigolf fan here, but sometimes dont feel like standing and want something a lil bit more chill. This is that. Just got it yesterday and a couple hours flew by before I knew. Havent tried the level maker yet but looks cool. Also once this gets multiplayer thisll prolly overtake walkabout as my most played game. (i am kinda lazy)

reviews.review_title: Adorable little game at your fingertips!
reviews.review_description: I found myself skeptical of hand tracking, to be honest, but I think the developer did a wonderful thing with the idea of pinch and pull to hit the ball. Pocket Putt immediately made me go "Oh wow this is a charming little golf course." very true to its name, it's the miniest mini golf. You can even make your own levels to play. I always love when I get to do that
